fields.description: When enabled, the POS Edit Item dialog can change the selling rate and POSNext will continue using its native recalculation flow.
fields.label: Allow Editable Selling Price on POS

fields.description: When enabled, cashiers can choose a posting date during checkout and the submitted POS invoice will use that date.
fields.label: Allow Editing Posting Date on POS

fields.description: Optional future guard. Enter one role per line or comma-separated. Leave empty to allow all POS users when selling price editing is enabled.
fields.label: Editable Price Roles
